subject: media: usb: fix memory leak in af9005_identify_state
notes: Stage1 features.json + Stage2 seed.c reused from lu-2-rep1 (deterministic from inputs).
Initial POC (multi-variant) failed verifier; regenerated lean single-buggy-function POC to match seed structural counts -> OK row.
POC locked at chmod 444, sha recorded. No drift during run.

Stage 4/5 collapsed into a single final.ql write (standard four-features template adapted: kmalloc/kfree, releasesVar argument check, hasLeakingReturn uses CFG to find a Return reachable from acquire without an intervening kfree of the variable).

final.ql compiled clean on first attempt; poc-db run produced exactly one row at kmalloc on line 36 inside af9005_identify_state_buggy. Oracle: buggy_fires=true, fixed_fires=false (no fixed in POC), fp_fires=false.
